---
applyTo: "**/*.js,**/*.mjs,**/*.jsx,**/*.ts,**/*.tsx,**/*.vue,tsconfig*.json,eslint.config.*,.eslintrc*"
description: "Apply the repository's TypeScript and ESLint guidance."
---

Canonical typing and linting guidance lives in `.ai/skills/eslint-typescript/SKILL.md`.

Prefer accurate types for config loaders, composables, and derived SEO helpers, keep public contracts typed, and treat lint warnings as a signal that the config-first starter may be drifting toward unnecessary complexity.
